events.name: China Caixin Manufacturing PMI (Jan)
events.description: Measures activity in the manufacturing sector through surveys of purchasing managers at private and state-owned firms.

events.name: US ISM Manufacturing PMI (Jan)
events.description: Provides a survey-based snapshot of the US manufacturing sector's health, focusing on orders, production, and employment.

events.name: Australia RBA Interest Rate Decision
events.description: The central bank sets the official cash rate, a key tool for managing inflation and economic stability.

events.name: US JOLTs Job Openings (Dec)
events.description: Measures the number of unfilled jobs, offering insights into labor market conditions and employer demand in the US.

events.name: Eurozone CPI (Y-o-Y) (Jan)
events.description: Tracks the annual change in the price of consumer goods and services, the primary inflation gauge for the Eurozone.

events.name: US ISM Services PMI (Jan)
events.description: Evaluates the strength of the US services sector, covering business activity, new orders, and employment levels.

events.name: UK BoE Interest Rate Decision
events.description: The Bank of England sets the bank rate to maintain price stability and support the government’s economic objectives.

events.name: Eurozone ECB Interest Rate Decision
events.description: The European Central Bank determines interest rates to manage inflation and maintain the purchasing power of the Euro.

events.name: US Non-Farm Payrolls (Jan)
events.description: Measures the number of workers added in the previous month, excluding the farming industry, reflecting labor market strength.

events.name: US Unemployment Rate (Jan)
events.description: The percentage of the labor force that is unemployed, serving as a critical indicator of economic performance.
